items.name: Super Angry Expression Anime Face - Dynamic Head
items.description:
Unleash the fury! 😡 This dynamic anime face is perfect for showing next-level rage in battle games, roleplays, or epic cutscenes. With fierce brows, clenched teeth, and intense energy—your avatar’s anger will never go unnoticed.

🔥 Ideal for PvP, anime fans, or just vibing mad in style.

💥 Pair it with fiery fits and dramatic effects.
Join my group WaterCat Meow Meow for more bold and expressive UGC!
